title: ShortRatio Mod
description: A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that sets the screen viewport to a 9:16 ratio with black bars when F9 is pressed
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/r_9PgW3MOWs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that sets the screen viewport to a 9:16 ratio with black bars when F9 is pressed. This Mod Is Mainly Made For Minecraft Shorts/Reel Creators Because It Saves The Time Of Retakes !
